creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 255400
patch to build on current

Here a proposal:
It build starting FreeBSD 14, but I’ve limited it to the exact moment it became mandatory.

I’ve tested with a:
re0@pci0:2:0:0: class=0x020000 rev=0x05 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x10ec device=0x8125 subvendor=0x10ec subdevice=0x0123
    vendor     = 'Realtek Semiconductor Co., Ltd.'
    device     = 'RTL8125 2.5GbE Controller'

Using iperf to check perf and stability and OSPF with net/frr10 to check multicast.
